message:
🐛 Guard nightly comparison report against empty output (#10031)

The nightly-compare.sh script can fail or produce no output when
there are no previous results to compare against. This caused the
'Post results to issue' step to fail with 'no such file or directory'
when trying to read /tmp/nightly-comparison.md.

Add a guard that creates a fallback report when the file is empty
or missing, so the workflow completes cleanly.

Fixes #10002

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -146,6 +146,17 @@ jobs:
           REPORT_FILE="/tmp/nightly-comparison.md"
           REGRESSION=0
           bash scripts/nightly-compare.sh "${{ steps.tests.outputs.result_file }}" "$RESULTS_DIR" > "$REPORT_FILE" || REGRESSION=1
+
+          # Ensure the report file exists even if the compare script failed
+          if [ ! -s "$REPORT_FILE" ]; then
+            echo "## Nightly Comparison Report" > "$REPORT_FILE"
+            echo "" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
+            echo "_Comparison script produced no output. This usually means there are no previous results to compare against._" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
+            echo "" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
+            echo "**Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%d)" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
+            echo "**Result file:** \`${{ steps.tests.outputs.result_file }}\`" >> "$REPORT_FILE"
+          fi
+
           echo "has_regression=${REGRESSION}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
 
       - name: Commit results to repo
